series_metadata.series_description: Payroll files from the Ethics Commission; warrant & disbursement records related to payroll; time logs, leave requests, pay period information and related documents contained in payroll files maintained by the agency.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until applicable fiscal period has been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved (at least 3 years), then destroy, Paper: Shred
